shared_properties: Card frames use an 80x120 px per-frame contract so five runtime instances fit the centered hand layout.
Card safe text area remains inside a 64x96 px inner panel in every frame.
differences: This sheet provides 11 frames covering Idle, Hover, Use, and Discard states for the reusable card UI frame.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Card size, state counts, and hand capacity grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Card border treatment, glow emphasis, and navy panel styling grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with one generic card frame atlas and spawn up to five UI ImageNode instances that swap atlas indices by card state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/card_frame_state_sheet.png through AssetServer and attach the atlas handle to hand-card UI nodes.
runtime_notes: The atlas uses 3 rows and 4 columns with one unused transparent cell.
Frame indices 0 are Idle, 1-2 are Hover, 3-6 are Use, and 7-10 are Discard.
Runtime spacing target is 100 px between card centers for five-card hands.

context.role: Reusable hand-card frame atlas for state changes during hover, use, and discard actions.
context.usage: Instanced up to five times at the bottom center of the duel screen.

deliverables.notes: 11 used frames arranged as 4 columns by 3 rows with one transparent spare cell.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 320x360 px with 11 used frames at 80x120 px each.
Visible border hex values are limited to #D4AF37, #BDC3C7, and #8E44AD.
Inner card face safe area remains exactly 64x96 px inside every state frame.
